title: agrostis alba var. coarctata
intro: Agrostis alba var. coarctata, also known as Dwarf Bristle Bent or Short-stemmed Bristle Bent, is a type of grass native to the mountainous regions of the Northern Hemisphere. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. The medicinal properties of Agrostis alba var. coarctata can be utilized through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically to affected areas. However, further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of using this plant for medicinal purposes.
